description: TENDER NOTICE Empanelment of Healthcare Service Provider The High Commission of the Islamic Republic of Pakistan, Kigali, invites Expressions of Interest (EOI) from reputable hospitals and healthcare institutions in Rwanda to take their service on panel as an authorized healthcare service provider for the medical treatment of Diplomats, Embassy Staff, and their family members. Bids are invited from reputed hospitals and healthcare institutions in Rwanda to take on panel of this High Commission as Authorized Medical Attendant (AMA) for the Officers /Officials and their family members. Interested healthcare service providers are requested to submit their proposals containing the following information: • Authorized Medical Attendant (AMA) • Corporate medical panel packages and tariff/quotations • Procedural requirements for establishing a corporate medical panel. • Details of medical services available, including outpatient, inpatient, emergency, laboratory Test , diagnostic, pharmacy, and specialist services. • Billing, invoicing, and payment procedure. • Contact details of the officer responsible for corporate partnerships or panel management. Submission of Proposals Sealed proposals should be submitted to the address below on or before no later than (3rd August 2026) Pakistan High Commission, Kigali, Rwanda Building N0: 54.KG 552 St, Kigali Rwanda. Tel: +250-252515560 or Cell: +250 796 899 891 Email: pahickigali@mofa.gov.pk The tender will be open at 3PM on 3rd August 2026. Hiring of IT Firm for Development of Centralized Digital Data Management System for Pakistan Tobacco Board (PTB)
description: Pakistan Tobacco Board (PTB) currently relies on a manual and fragmented system for collection, compilation, and monitoring of crop, procurement, cess, and stakeholder data. Crop estimates, yield assessments, procurement data, and cess records are collected manually through field visits, physical forms, and spreadsheets, resulting in delays in reporting, data inconsistencies, limited traceability, and lack of real-time operational visibility PTB intends to hire a registered firm to develop a centralized digital platform comprising mobile applications (IOS & Android), web-based portals, centralized database, and executive dashboards for collection, reporting, monitoring, and analytics of tobacco sector data. At initial stage, the system shall focus on digital data collection, reporting, monitoring, and analytics. Detail information about organization is available on website: www.ptb.gov.pk. Bidding documents containing detail term and conditions, item-wise specification, procedure for submission of bids, bids security etc may be obtained from office of the Deputy Secretory Admn or download from PPRA website: www.ppra.org.pk or www.ptb.gov.pk. Accordingly firm will be selected through, “Single Stage Two Envelopes” procedure in accordance with the procedures set out in Rule- 36(b) of PPRA Rules, 2004 issued by the Public Procurement Regulatory Authority, as amended from time to time which can be viewed at the website: www.ppra.org.pk/legal documents/regulations. The parameters for evaluating bids are mentioned in bidding documents: Bidding documents must carefully be prepared in accordance with the instructions provided and shall be submitted through EPADS as per schedule mentioned on ePADs which shall be opened on the same day at 14:30 pm in the presence of and Bidders who may choose to be present.
